subject: eol wti maket maker simulation model

emails.subject: EOL WTI maket maker simulation model
emails.subject_base: EOL WTI maket maker simulation model
emails.body: John, Here is the spreadsheet Zimin built for estimaing P/L from trading WTI forwards. Let Zimin, Vince, or I know if you have questions or comments. --Stinson Forwarded by Stinson Gibner/HOU/ECT on 11/20/2000 11:14 AM Zimin Lu 11/17/2000 04:37 PM

emails.subject: Re: EOL WTI maket maker simulation model
emails.subject_base: EOL WTI maket maker simulation model
emails.body: Re: EOL WTI maket maker simulation model Stinson The model looks great except when I changed an input and hit go it blew up. Maybe I'm doing something wrong. One thing that I would like changed is that I want to make the swap product and product that settles against the 2nd last day. So the role should happen on the second last day not the last day. Please change that if you can. John
